config.restart.confirm: Really restart AuraGo service? (Takes about 3-5 seconds)
config.restart.reloading: De pagina wordt zo automatisch herladen...
config.restart.error: Fout: herstart kon niet worden aangevraagd.
config.llm.info_banner: Model, URL and API key are taken from the provider entry in provider management. Only advanced LLM settings are configured here.
config.llm.helper_enabled_banner: The Helper LLM is enabled. AuraGo uses it for internal analysis and background tasks and batches helper requests whenever possible. A smaller, faster and cheaper model is usually a good fit here.
config.llm.helper_disabled_banner: The Helper LLM is disabled. Many dependent analysis and background features will not work fully, and AuraGo cannot use its full potential without it.
config.llm.helper_guardian_banner: The LLM Guardian always uses its own separate model path. It is not routed through the Helper LLM.
config.llm.multimodal_banner: Multimodaal (afbeeldingen): Ingeschakeld kunnen geüploade afbeeldingen in de chat direct naar het hoofdmodel worden gestuurd.
config.embeddings.info_banner: Embeddings convert text into numerical vectors, allowing the agent to find semantically similar content. This powers the agent's long-term memory: conversation content, notes and indexed files are stored as embeddings and retrieved automatically when relevant. Model and URL are taken from the selected provider entry.
config.budget.info_banner: Values that cannot be determined directly (e.g. local models without token reporting) are estimated internally. The displayed usage may differ from the actual usage. This feature does not replace setting spending limits directly at the provider or API.
config.tools.warning_banner: Deze instellingen moeten normaal niet worden gewijzigd. Het uitschakelen van tools beperkt de mogelijkheden van de agent aanzienlijk.
config.master_key.label: Hoofdsleutel
config.master_key.vault_exists: Kluis bestaat – hoofdsleutel vergrendeld. Verwijder de kluis om een nieuwe sleutel in te stellen.
config.master_key.no_vault: Geen kluis gevonden. Voer een nieuwe sleutel in, sla op en herstart AuraGo.
config.meshcentral.test_desc: Test login en WebSocket-handshake met de hierboven ingevoerde waarden. Ongewijzigde velden gebruiken de opgeslagen configuratiewaarden.
config.openrouter.model_is_free: Dit model is gratis te gebruiken
config.openrouter.costs_auto_imported: Kosten worden automatisch geïmporteerd voor budgetbeheer.
config.vault.delete_desc:
This will permanently delete the vault. All stored API keys, passwords and credentials will be lost forever!

Type delete to continue:
config.vault.deleted_toast: ✓ Kluis verwijderd. Voer een nieuwe hoofdsleutel in, sla op en herstart AuraGo.
config.budget.models_moved_hint: Model costs are now managed in Provider settings.
config.embeddings.change_warning_banner: Changing the embeddings model or provider can make existing embeddings incompatible. AuraGo can delete the old embeddings and rebuild them after restart.
config.embeddings.reset_desc: This change will likely make existing embeddings incompatible. AuraGo can delete the old embeddings and rebuild the knowledge index after restart.
config.embeddings.reset_desc_postsave: The configuration is already saved. To avoid mismatched embeddings, AuraGo should now delete the old embeddings and rebuild them after restart.
config.embeddings.reset_point_vectors: Existing long-term memory vectors may no longer match the new embeddings model.
config.embeddings.reset_point_rebuild: Tool guides, documentation and indexed knowledge files will be rebuilt after restart.
config.embeddings.reset_point_memories: Stored conversation memories in the vector database will be deleted and rebuilt only when new content is archived again.
config.embeddings.reset_confirm_final: Echt the existing embeddings and rebuild them after restart verwijderen?
config.embeddings.reset_restarting: Oude embeddings ingepland voor verwijdering. AuraGo herstart nu…
config.embeddings.reset_pending_warning: Embedding-wijziging opgeslagen. De oude embeddings blijven aanwezig tot u verwijdering bevestigt en herstart.
config.embeddings.reset_error: The embeddings reset could not be scheduled.
